name: Denied comp for machine accident, sue employer instead?
description: No suing employer; appeal comp or third-party.

mainEntity.name: Denied comp for machine accident, sue employer instead?

acceptedAnswer.text: No suing employer; appeal comp or third-party.
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, workers' comp exclusive remedy unless intentional harm.** Rare exception[2]. Appeal denial first[1]. Third-parties yes. Attorney explores all.
